title: Point of Sale Web Platform
description: A web platform developed for a shoe store, with a realtime window-based interface, complete inventory control and custom tools like barcode, QR and tickets generator and a warehouse order system.

images.alt: Admin desktop view with quick shortcuts and status and navigation bars
Products list view with bulk import, editing and advanced filters/sorting accessible from the column headers
A purchases wizard that allows the user to make new product entries quickly
A fully-featured QR/codebar/ticket editor for auto-contained editing within the platform
POS system to process sales orders and print tickets
A mobile first interface for store front personnel with camera scanner and fast access to inventory stock
Warehouse orders to directly send products to be retrieved by warehouse users
Window-based navigation with real-time updates via Websockets, for cashier and admin users

title: Unit tracking tools
description: A set of visualization tools developed for an All in One platform, for a company in the industry of personnel transportation, consisting of a timeline tracker, realtime unit tracker and a time report generator with geofences and stop markers.

images.alt: A timeline tracker designed to see the current stop the bus unit is currently on
Map visualizer which is updated in real time, showing the unit position and stops marker
A time report generated with every position of the bus during its journey

title: Admin dashboard for GPS and invoicing system
description: An admin dashboard for a GPS and invoicing system, with unit deactivation, billing control and services reports, with custom charts and useful insights. Featuring API integration with third party services like Paypal for invoice payment, among others.

images.alt: Admin dashboard with units and equipment metrics, total balance and support contact information
Invoice control panel with payment details, digital invoice generation and Paypal integration
Custom monitoring dashboard with charts and insights about units and GPS alerts

title: Personal Website
description: A minimalist, low-resource website made with a Dinotext parser, a custom markup language, which allows to create new pages in a matter of seconds.

images.alt: Home page of my personal website
Music page of my personal website, with information about my songs
A song page made with Dinotext, with images, formatted text and hyperlinks

title: Martial arts school website
description: A landing page designed for a martial arts school, showcasing classes, schedule, and contact information.

images.alt: Home page of the martial arts school website, with information regarding the school
Classes and schedule information with interactive images slideshow
Contact information with Google Maps integration and social media links

title: Dinotext
description: Dinotext is a markup language, inspired by Markdown, which is the engine powering my main website. It is currently in a very early stage, but I have plans to make it a more formal markup language with real-world applications.
